name: X Archetype
short_description: X Archetype is a Side Scrolling Fast Paced Shooter. Decide which stage to take down and gain its upgrades. Dash, Jump, Wall jump, High jump, Double Jump, Wall Slide, 360 Degree Aiming are what you start with, and you gain insane Upgrades Each Stage you beat.
detailed_description:
All music added with game for free

All songs in X Archetype are zipped up from the original mp3 format and free to use at your disposal.


About the Game

Far away, in the Black-eye galaxy There was a solar system called Iris. Terra, the Fifth from the star inhabited many life forms. One of which was the Terran's. They advanced in technology, but are a peaceful people. One day the other inhabitants became enraged and stormed the Terran cities. All Cities were ransacked, and the people put in cages. All except one town. A man named Xavier fought off the enraged beasts with his sheer might. Now with the help of one of the locals he saved, Kim (An expert in weapon technology) he sets out to free his brothers in bondage. This is the story of X, the Archetype! DrCat (GOG.com) The game looks quite difficult, but also balanced at the same time. Action-packed gameplay is quite fun and addictive.
